ID.Description: Subject number at the time of research

Pre_ID.Description: Subject number at the time of raw data acquisition

Dominant_hand.Description: The hand that a person uses more in daily life

laser_low.Description: mean the laser energy intensity (measured in Joules) corresponds to a pain score of 4 out of 10

laser_high.Description: mean the laser energy intensity (measured in Joules) corresponds to a pain score of 7 out of 10.

TENS.Description: mean the electrical stimulation energy intensity (mV) that the subjects subjectively described as having a stinging sensation but not very painful and bearable.
